content.claim: Early gimnázium selection (6/8-year track) adds an additional, earlier sorting layer atop pre-existing residential/ethnic segregation and the later 3-way secondary track split, operating as a sorting relocation mechanism rather than a sorting reduction mechanism.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Equity and social mobility lens
limitations: Interpretive synthesis across multiple sources rather than single empirical finding
Causal claim about mechanism interaction not directly tested in available literature
Counterfactual (what sorting would look like without 6/8-year track) not empirically measured
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
